events.description: Operation Epic Fury begins. US and Israeli forces launch coordinated airstrikes on Tehran, striking Khamenei's compound and killing Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei along with family members.

US B-2 stealth bombers and B-52s strike fortified ballistic missile facilities and IRGC headquarters across Tehran. Approximately 200 Israeli fighter jets participate in the largest IAF combat sortie in history.
Israeli and US strikes hit nuclear-related facilities and missile production sites in Isfahan, continuing the degradation of Iran's nuclear infrastructure begun in 2025's Operation Midnight Hammer.
US and Israeli strikes target IRGC Aerospace Force underground missile base near Kermanshah (Panj Pelleh base) and at least 15 buildings in the Kermanshah missile factory complex.
Strikes hit IRGC and nuclear-related facilities in Karaj, northwest of Tehran, targeting centrifuge component manufacturing sites.
US and Israeli airstrikes target military and IRGC facilities in Qom, including Basij bases. Assembly of Experts members reportedly present in the city.

Airstrike destroys the Shajareh Tayyebeh girls' elementary school in Minab, Hormozgan province, during the school day. Between 80 and 180 people killed, mostly schoolchildren. US investigation later suggests American forces likely responsible.
events.civilian_impact: Elementary girls' school struck during school day, approximately 180 people killed, mostly schoolchildren

events.description: US and Israeli strikes set Iran's naval headquarters at Bandar Abbas ablaze. Satellite imagery shows 11 Iranian warships sunk in the Gulf of Oman, including frigates and Iran's sole Kilo-class submarine.

IRGC launches retaliatory missile barrage at Tel Aviv. A ballistic missile with a several-hundred-kilogram warhead strikes a residential block, killing a civilian woman (a foreign caregiver) and injuring 22 others.
events.civilian_impact: One civilian woman (foreign caregiver) killed, 22 others injured in residential strike

events.description: IRGC announces missile attacks targeting Israeli government in Tel Aviv, security and military centers in Haifa, and positions in East Jerusalem as part of initial retaliatory wave.

Iran launches first wave of retaliatory ballistic missiles and drones toward US bases in Gulf states, targeting Al Dhafra Air Base in Abu Dhabi. Debris falls in residential area near Zayed International Airport, killing one Pakistani civilian.
events.civilian_impact: One Pakistani civilian killed by debris from intercepted missile near Zayed International Airport

events.description: Iranian drone strikes Kuwait International Airport, injuring several employees and causing material damage to the passenger terminal. One person killed.
events.civilian_impact: One person killed in drone strike on airport; smoke reported near US Embassy area

events.description: Saraya Awliya al-Dam (Guardians of Blood), affiliated with Islamic Resistance in Iraq, launches drone and missile attacks on US bases at Erbil International Airport in retaliation for Khamenei's death. Explosions heard across the airport.
Iranian drone strike hits a makeshift US operations center at Shuaiba civilian port in Kuwait, killing six US service members with no prior warning or siren. Four others seriously injured.
events.civilian_impact: Six US service members killed, four others seriously injured at makeshift operations center

events.description: Iranian ballistic missile strikes a synagogue and bomb shelter in Beit Shemesh near Jerusalem, killing nine people including three teenage siblings. The 500kg warhead penetrated the public shelter. 49 others injured.
events.civilian_impact: Nine people killed including three teenage siblings in synagogue and bomb shelter strike; 49 others injured

events.description: Iran fires missiles at locations across Qatar including Hamad International Airport. Qatari F-15s down two Iranian Su-24 bombers. Qatar intercepts multiple drone and missile strikes. 16 people injured in Qatar.
events.civilian_impact: 16 people injured in Qatar from missile and drone strikes; no deaths reported

events.description: Explosions rock Dubai, Doha, and Manama as Iran targets US assets across the Gulf for a second consecutive day. Multiple missiles intercepted over Saudi Arabia and Bahrain.

Iran officially closes the Strait of Hormuz using drone strikes near the waterway. Tanker traffic drops 70%, then falls to near zero. Over 150 ships anchor outside the strait. Global oil prices spike over 10%.
Hezbollah launches first rocket barrage at Israel since 2024 ceasefire, targeting the Mishmar HaCarmel air defense site south of Haifa with rockets and drones, opening a new front in the war.

Israel launches massive airstrikes on Beirut's Dahieh southern suburbs, targeting Hezbollah headquarters. Hezbollah intelligence chief Hussein Makled killed along with senior IRGC Quds Force commanders.
events.civilian_impact: 31 people killed in strikes on Beirut suburbs

events.description: Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon kill 11 people and wound 58 as IDF issues evacuation orders to 50 villages across southern Lebanon and the Bekaa Valley.
events.civilian_impact: 11 people killed, 58 wounded in southern Lebanon; IDF issues evacuation orders to 50 villages across southern Lebanon and Bekaa Valley

events.description: QatarEnergy ceases all natural gas production and declares Force Majeure on buyer contracts due to ongoing Iranian missile and drone attacks on Qatar.
US, Bahrain, Jordan, Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and UAE issue joint statement condemning Iranian missile and drone attacks across the region and affirming their right to self-defence.
Israeli military announces ground incursion into southern Lebanon as 'forward defence' operation. Tanks and bulldozers advance from Metula toward Tal al-Nahas between Kfarkela and Burj al-Muluk.

Two Iranian drones strike the US Embassy compound in Riyadh's Diplomatic Quarter, causing a fire and minor material damage. No casualties reported. US Embassy issues shelter-in-place notice across Saudi Arabia.
Israeli Air Force strikes the Assembly of Experts building in Qom while Iranian clerics reportedly gather to deliberate on selecting Khamenei's successor. Casualties reported among members.

Syria deploys Interior Ministry forces and elite troops to the frontier with Israeli-occupied Golan Heights, setting up roadblocks near Jabata al-Khashab and Khan Arnabeh to prevent Iranian proxy remnants from provoking Israeli retaliation.
Syria moves hundreds of soldiers, tanks, troop carriers, and field artillery from Kurdish front lines in eastern Syria to the border with Lebanon's Hezbollah strongholds.

USS Charlotte (Los Angeles-class submarine) torpedoes and sinks Iranian Navy frigate IRIS Dena in the Indian Ocean, 19 nautical miles off Galle, Sri Lanka, with two Mark 48 torpedoes. Ship sinks within 2-3 minutes. 87 Iranian sailors killed.

Iranian ballistic missile penetrates air defenses and strikes Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar, the largest US military installation in the Middle East. The AN/FPS-132 early-warning radar system ($1.1B) is damaged. No casualties reported.

Iranian catamaran corvette IRIS Shahid Sayyad Shirazi (Soleimani-class) struck by US forces, left burning at sea with considerable damage. Part of broader campaign that destroyed Iran's entire Gulf of Oman fleet.

Iran's Fars News Agency reports Iran has fired over 500 ballistic and naval missiles and almost 2,000 drones since Feb 28. US reports Iran's ballistic missile rate has dropped 90% and drone rate 83% since day one, suggesting depletion of stocks.

Islamic Resistance in Iraq continues daily drone and missile attacks on US assets, with over 110 attacks on Kurdistan Region since the war began. Targets include Harir Air Base, the US consulate in Erbil, and Baghdad airport logistics.

Heavy overnight bombing of Tehran on day seven. Strikes target remaining military infrastructure, air defenses, and missile launchers. IDF reports approximately 5,000 bombs dropped since the start of the war.
Iran targets Israeli embassy in Bahrain and fires missiles toward Saudi Arabia. Iranian missiles intercepted over Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE, and Bahrain activates air raid sirens.
Israel strikes Beirut and Tehran. Trump demands Iran's 'unconditional surrender'. Lebanon death toll from Israeli attacks reaches at least 294 killed, 1,023 wounded, and 95,000 displaced.
events.civilian_impact: At least 294 killed and 1,023 wounded in Lebanon; 95,000 displaced from Israeli attacks

events.description: Washington Post reports Russia is providing Iran with intelligence to target US forces, escalating great-power dimensions of the conflict.

Israeli airstrikes kill at least 41 people and wound 40 in the town of Nabi Chit in eastern Lebanon's Bekaa Valley. Strikes coincide with a commando raid seeking remains of missing IAF navigator Ron Arad.
events.civilian_impact: At least 41 people killed and 40 wounded in Nabi Chit, Bekaa Valley during airstrike coinciding with commando raid

events.description: Israeli helicopter-borne commandos land deep in eastern Lebanon near Nabi Chit cemetery for overnight raid. Hezbollah fighters engage the force, clashes escalate before Israeli extraction. No Israeli casualties.
UAE intercepts 109 drones and 9 ballistic missiles fired from Iran in a single day, the highest single-day intercept count reported by any Gulf state during the conflict.
events.civilian_impact: UAE intercepts 109 drones and 9 ballistic missiles in single day; no casualties reported from successful interceptions

events.description: One person killed in Dubai amid ongoing Iranian missile and drone attacks. Iranian projectiles continue to strike Gulf countries' infrastructure as the war enters its eighth day.
events.civilian_impact: One person killed in Dubai during Iranian missile and drone attacks

events.description: Debris from Israeli and Iranian missile exchanges hits 18 locations across Syria, concentrated in Daraa, Quneitra, and Rif Dimashq governorates. Syria's disaster directorate warns residents of unexploded ordnance.

War enters day nine. Over 500,000 displaced in Lebanon. Total Iranian civilian death toll exceeds 1,300 per Iranian Red Crescent. Conflict shows no signs of de-escalation as Iran announces appointment of new supreme leader.
events.civilian_impact: Over 500,000 displaced in Lebanon; total Iranian civilian death toll exceeds 1,300 per Iranian Red Crescent

events.description: Houthi leader Abdulmalik al-Houthi delivers speeches supporting Iran but does not announce retaliatory military action. Internal debate within Houthis over whether to resume Red Sea attacks and join the war.

US warships launch Tomahawk cruise missiles at Iranian targets. US Army HIMARS launchers also employed. Strikes target Iranian air defences, drone launch sites, airfields, and missile production facilities across western and central Iran.
Total civilian casualties in Iran surpass 1,300 killed according to Iranian Red Crescent. Damage includes the Grand Bazaar in Tehran and Golestan Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
events.civilian_impact: Total civilian casualties in Iran surpass 1,300 killed according to Iranian Red Crescent. Infrastructure damage includes Grand Bazaar in Tehran and Golestan Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

events.description: Continued US strikes target Iranian military sites in Tabriz, expanding the geographic scope of Operation Epic Fury to northwestern Iran near the Azerbaijan border.
Israeli strikes on Beirut suburbs and southern Lebanon kill 52 people and injure 154 in the deadliest single day of the Lebanon front. Multiple Hezbollah command posts and weapons caches destroyed.
events.civilian_impact: 52 people killed and 154 injured in deadliest single day of Lebanon front; multiple Hezbollah command posts and weapons caches destroyed

events.description: Israel escalates attacks across Lebanon as two Israeli soldiers killed. More than 517,000 registered as displaced during the conflict according to Lebanon's social affairs minister.
events.civilian_impact: Two Israeli soldiers killed; more than 517,000 registered as displaced in Lebanon

metadata.notes: Events compiled from multiple open sources. Casualty figures represent reported numbers and may be revised. Coordinates are approximate city/site-level locations.
